intent: Self-host the gate: give the plumbline repo its own .plumbline/ policy + mission, a CI pipeline (test job: tsc, build, full suite; plumbline job: the gate running this PR's own code via uses: ./), and contributor docs for the receipt loop. Scope: repo configuration and docs only — no changes to enforcement source code. This PR touches protected surfaces (.plumbline/**, .github/workflows/**) by definition, so it is self-modifying and must be human-reviewed.
